title: PM Modi, Xi Jinping hold bilateral meet in Tianjin: Deal done over border management
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is in China for the first time in seven years to attend a two-day meeting of the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation.
keywords: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Xi Jinping, bilateral meeting, Shanghai Cooperation Organisation, border management
